message:
chore: bump all workspace crates to v0.2.0 for release

Update package versions and inter-crate dependency version specs from
0.1.x to 0.2.0 across all 20 workspace crates. Add publish = false to
WASM/demo crates (frankenterm-web, ftui-showcase-wasm, ftui-demo-showcase).
Add missing version specs to frankenterm-core dev-dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankenterm-web"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
+publish = false
 license = "MIT"
 description = "WASM frontend for FrankenTerm: web rendering + input, exported via wasm-bindgen."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
@@ -24,8 +25,8 @@ wasm-opt = ["-Oz", "--all-features", "--converge"]
 default = []
 
 [dependencies]
-frankenterm-core = { path = "../frankenterm-core", version = "0.1.0" }
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
+frankenterm-core = { path = "../frankenterm-core", version = "0.2.0" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.2.0" }
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0.145"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-backend"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Backend traits for FrankenTUI: platform abstraction for input, presentation, and time."
@@ -10,5 +10,5 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-backend"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.0" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.2.0" }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-core"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Terminal lifecycle, capabilities, and event parsing for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-i18n"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Localization catalog and interpolation utilities for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-layout"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Flex and grid layout solvers for FrankenTUI."
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-layout"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.0" }
 rustc-hash = "2.1"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-pty"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "PTY-backed test utilities for FrankenTUI."
@@ -10,8 +10,8 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-pty"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
-frankenterm-core = { path = "../frankenterm-core", version = "0.1.0", features = ["ws-codec"] }
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1", features = ["crossterm"] }
+frankenterm-core = { path = "../frankenterm-core", version = "0.2.0", features = ["ws-codec"] }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.0", features = ["crossterm"] }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 serde_json = "1.0.145"
 time = { version = "0.3.44", features = ["formatting"] }

@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-showcase-wasm"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
+publish = false
 license = "MIT"
 description = "WASM showcase runner for FrankenTUI demo app."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
@@ -12,9 +13,9 @@ readme = "../../README.md"
 crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-web = { path = "../ftui-web", version = "0.1.0", features = ["input-parser"] }
-ftui-demo-showcase = { path = "../ftui-demo-showcase", version = "0.1.1", default-features = false }
-ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout", version = "0.1.1" }
+ftui-web = { path = "../ftui-web", version = "0.2.0", features = ["input-parser"] }
+ftui-demo-showcase = { path = "../ftui-demo-showcase", version = "0.2.0", default-features = false }
+ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout", version = "0.2.0" }
 
 [target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies]
 js-sys = "0.3.85"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-simd"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Optional safe SIMD-friendly optimizations for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-style"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Style, theme, and color primitives for FrankenTUI."
@@ -12,15 +12,15 @@ readme = "../../README.md"
 [dependencies]
 ahash = "0.8"
 arc-swap = "1.8.2"
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.2.0" }
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"], optional = true }
 
 [features]
 serde = ["dep:serde"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.0" }
 tracing-test = "0.2.5"
 proptest = "1.7.0"
 serde_json = "1.0.149"
